positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of abstract celestial flora, featuring stylized lunar blossoms, geometric constellations, and drifting nebulae patterns. The style is highly refined mid-century modern illustration meets esoteric tattoo art, rendered with bold, clean black outlines and sophisticated flat coloring. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo blue, muted teal, mustard yellow, and creamy parchment white, maximizing contrast. Composition is centralized and highly symmetrical, creating a perfect circular or medallion silhouette. Graphic quality, designed for high-resolution apparel printing, ultra-crisp lines, clean vector aesthetic, flat depth.
negative: blur, noisy, rough, distorted, grainy, smudge, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, low detail, photographic, photorealism
